name: mcp-server-alibabacloud-rds
description: MCP server for Alibaba Cloud RDS OpenAPI, enabling programmatic management of RDS resources.

rating.reason: The toolset shows mixed documentation quality. While some tools like `create_db_instance` and `describe_available_zones` have comprehensive descriptions and well-documented parameters, many others suffer from poor formatting (excessive whitespace, inconsistent structure), minimal descriptions, and inadequate parameter documentation. Basic functionality is covered but significant gaps exist in explaining parameter constraints, relationships between parameters, and usage context.
